content.json:
# TagPulse SLO Dashboard

Fronts the four SLOs in `docs/observability/slos.md`. Each KQL block is also kept under `ops/azure-monitor/kql/` so they version with the code; edit there first, then paste back.

content.query: let api = requests | where timestamp > ago(28d) | where url contains '/api/v1' | where url !contains '/health/' | where url !endswith '/metrics' | where url !contains '/openapi.json'; api | summarize total = count(), errors = countif(toint(resultCode) >= 500), p95_ms = percentile(duration, 95) by bin(timestamp, 5m) | extend availability_pct = 100.0 * (total - errors) / total | project timestamp, total, errors, availability_pct, p95_ms | order by timestamp desc
content.title: SLO #1 + #2 — API availability and p95 latency

content.query: customMetrics | where timestamp > ago(7d) | where name == 'tagpulse_mqtt_subscriber_last_message_age_seconds' | extend env = tostring(customDimensions['service.namespace']) | summarize age_p95 = percentile(value, 95), age_max = max(value) by bin(timestamp, 5m), env | order by timestamp desc
content.title: SLO #3 — Ingestion freshness (lower is better)

content.query: customMetrics | where timestamp > ago(7d) | where name == 'tagpulse_dead_letter_events_total' | extend source = tostring(customDimensions['source']) | summarize rows_per_hour = sum(value) by bin(timestamp, 1h), source | order by timestamp desc, source asc
content.title: SLO #4 — Dead-letter rows by source (Sprint 28 C3)

content.query: requests | where timestamp > ago(24h) | where toint(resultCode) >= 500 | extend tenant_id = tostring(customDimensions['tenant_id']), tenant_slug = tostring(customDimensions['tenant_slug']) | where isnotempty(tenant_id) | summarize errors = count(), latest = max(timestamp) by tenant_id, tenant_slug | order by errors desc
content.title: 5xx by tenant (Sprint 28 D5 attribute)
